subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Akbar! Thou hast attained unto the lights of the Kingdom, when thou didst turn unto the Most Exalted Horizon on a Day wherein all were shaken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اکبر قد فزت بانوار الملکوت اذ اقبلت الی الافق الاعلی فی یوم فیه اضطربت
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God
